name: io.github.douglasgan/asktian
description: Chinese metaphysics (bazi, qimen, 5-element) as decision-support tools for AI agents.

environmentVariables.name: ASKTIAN_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: OPTIONAL. Readings are free and work with no key (public backend, rate-limited to ~300 requests / 15 min). Set a key from https://api.asktian.com for higher rate limits and the premium tian.* reading tier.
